options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: EndGoal
options.description:
Determine the goal for the seed

Defeat Voldemort: Collect the 7 Horcruxes and defeat Voldemort in The Flaw in the Plan

options.name: NumHorcruxRequired
options.description: Determine the required number of Horcruxes to beat the game.

options.name: NumStartSpells
options.description: Determine the number of starting spells (excludes joke spells).

options.name: NumStartLevels
options.description: Determine the number of starting levels.

options.name: StartingLevelOptions
options.description:
Determines which levels you start with.
Please note due to technical limitations, you will always start with Dark Times.

Valid Keys:
"Dumbledore's Army"
"Focus!"
"Kreacher Discomforts"
"A Giant Virtuoso"
"A Veiled Threat"
"Out of Retirement"
"Just Desserts"
"A Not So Merry Christmas"
"Love Hurts"
"Felix Felicis"
"The Horcrux and the Hand"
"The Seven Harry's"
"Magic is Might"
"In Grave Danger"
"Sword and Locket"
"Lovegood's Lunacy"
"DOBBY!"
"The Thief's Downfall"
"Back to School"
"Burning Bridges"
"Fiendfyre Frenzy"
"Snape's Tears"
"The Flaw in the Plan"

options.name: ShuffleJokeSpells
options.description: Turning this on makes it so Joke Shop purchases are shuffled

options.name: ShuffleGoldBrickPurchases
options.description: Turning this on makes it so Gold Brick purchases are shuffled

options.name: CheaperShops
options.description:
Determines how many times cheaper purchases are from vanilla game.
1 is no change and 10 is 10x cheaper.
This is taken into account for stud multiplier logic

options.name: HardPurchases
options.description: Turning this on makes it so purchases no longer require a stud multiplier.

options.name: LowMultiplierPriceMinimum
options.description:
Determines the starting price for a low multiplier.
A low multiplier is defined as any multiplier.

options.name: HighMultiplierPriceMinimum
options.description:
Determines the starting price for a high multiplier.
Must be larger than Low Multiplier Price.
A high multiplier is defined as Score x6, Score x8, Score x10 or both Score x2 and Score x4.

options.name: StartingDetectors
options.description: Determines if the player starts with Character Token, Red Brick, Hogwarts Crest, & Gold Brick Detectors.

options.name: StartingFastMagic
options.description: Determines if the player starts with Fast Magic & Dig.
